parameters.query: Full Stack Developer AI developer in India

jobs.job_description:
Job Description: Full Stack Engineer (Java & Angular)

· Role: Full Stack Engineer

· Job Location: Bangalore

· Word Mode: Hybrid

· Experience: 4+ years

About the Role

We are seeking a Full Stack Engineer with 4+ years of hands on experience developing cloud ready applications using Java, Spring Boot, Python-based microservices, and modern front-end frameworks using Angular. The ideal candidate will contribute to both backend microservices and GUI development for web and mobile views, while working with RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.

Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and maintain backend microservices using Java, Spring Boot, and Python.

- Build responsive, user-friendly UIs using Angular 18, CSS, HTML, and JavaScript.

- Design and consume RESTful APIs for web and mobile interfaces.

- Implement database interactions with PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

- Assist in cloud deployments and CI/CD workflows.

- Collaborate with senior engineers on architecture, testing, and performance optimization.

Technical Skills Required

- 4+ years of hands-on full stack development experience.

- Strong programming fundamentals in Java (must have) and Python (good to have).

- Experience building microservices using Spring Boot and Python frameworks.

- Angular (must have) experience for web and mobile responsive UIs.

- Strong knowledge of JavaScript, CSS, HTML5.

- RESTful API design and consumption.

- Database knowledge: PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

- Understanding of docker and cloud concepts and native Kubernetes commands

- Working know how Git, CI/CD , and container fundamentals (Docker commands).

Additional Preferred Skills

- Exposure to unit testing frameworks (JUnit, PyTest).

- Basic understanding of Kubernetes and container orchestration concepts.

- Understanding of API security, authentication, and authorization standards.

- Familiarity with Agile methodologies.

- Willingness to learn DevOps practices and cloud-native design.

Soft Skills

- Strong problem solving and analytical ability.

- Good communication and teamwork skills.

- Ability to adapt quickly and learn new technologies.

- Attention to detail and willingness to write clean, maintainable code.

Integers.Ai is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

jobs.job_title: Founding Engineer Full Stack AI product development
jobs.job_description:
Founding AI Full Stack Engineer

Location: Chennai, India (Work from Office)

Company: Hibiz Solutions & Cuesys.ai

⸻

Build the Future of Enterprise AI

We’re looking for an exceptional Founding AI Full Stack Engineer who wants to build products that redefine how businesses use AI.

This is not another software engineering job.

You’ll work directly with the founders to design, build and launch AI-native enterprise products from the ground up. You’ll have significant influence over technology decisions, product direction, engineering culture and architecture.

If you’re excited about building rather than maintaining, this role is for you.

⸻

About Us

Hibiz Solutions has spent over a decade helping global enterprises build mission-critical software across ERP, CRM, Supply Chain and Manufacturing.

Cuesys.ai is our next-generation AI company focused on building enterprise AI products, intelligent agents and expert systems that augment business knowledge and automate complex workflows.

Our mission is simple:

Build AI that businesses actually trust and use.

⸻

What You’ll Build

You’ll work on products involving:
• Enterprise AI Agents
• Multi-agent systems
• RAG applications
• Knowledge Graphs
• MCP (Model Context Protocol)
• AI workflow automation
• AI copilots
• Voice AI
• Document Intelligence
• Manufacturing & Supply Chain AI
• Salesforce Agentforce solutions
• AI platforms for enterprise customers

⸻

Responsibilities
• Design and build production-grade AI applications
• Build modern full-stack web applications from scratch
• Develop scalable backend APIs and microservices
• Integrate LLMs from OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and open-source models
• Design RAG pipelines using vector databases
• Build AI agent workflows and orchestration frameworks
• Develop intuitive user interfaces for AI products
• Deploy cloud-native applications on Azure and AWS
• Work closely with founders on product strategy
• Prototype rapidly and iterate based on customer feedback
• Help establish engineering standards and best practices
• Mentor future engineering hires as the team grows

⸻

Required Skills

AI
• Strong understanding of LLMs
• Prompt Engineering
• Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)
• AI Agents
• MCP
• Function Calling
• Embeddings
• Vector Databases
• Fine-tuning concepts
• AI evaluation methodologies

Backend
• Python
• FastAPI
• Node.js
• REST APIs
• GraphQL
• PostgreSQL
• Redis
• Docker
• Kubernetes

Frontend
• React
• Next.js
• TypeScript
• Tailwind CSS
• Modern UI frameworks

Cloud & DevOps
• Azure or AWS
• CI/CD
• GitHub
• Infrastructure as Code
• Monitoring & Observability

Bonus Skills

Experience with:
• LangGraph
• LangChain
• CrewAI
• AutoGen
• Semantic Kernel
• Azure AI Foundry
• Azure OpenAI
• Salesforce Agentforce
• Manufacturing or Supply Chain domain
• ERP/CRM platforms

⸻

What We’re Looking For
• 5+ years of software engineering experience
• Proven experience shipping production software
• Demonstrated AI application development
• Strong system design skills
• Excellent product thinking
• High ownership mindset
• Comfortable with ambiguity
• Builder mentality
• Curious, fast learner and self-driven

Most importantly, we’re looking for someone who wants to create something meaningful—not just complete tickets.

⸻

Why Join Us?

As one of our earliest engineering hires, you’ll:
• Help shape the engineering culture
• Influence technical direction
• Work directly with experienced founders
• Build products used by global enterprises
• Learn cutting-edge AI technologies
• Solve challenging real-world problems
• Grow into an Engineering Lead or CTO-track role as the company scales

⸻

What Success Looks Like

Within your first year, you’ll have:
• Built multiple production AI applications
• Contributed to launching new AI products
• Designed reusable AI platform components
• Helped establish our engineering best practices
• Played a key role in building a world-class AI engineering team

⸻

Location

📍 Chennai, India (Work from Office)

jobs.job_title: Full Stack Developer (AI Integration) On-the-Job Training
jobs.job_description:
Are you a recent graduate looking to build a career in Full Stack Development?

Many freshers find it challenging to secure their first IT job due to a lack of practical experience. Our On-the-Job Training (OJT) Program is designed to bridge that gap by providing hands-on experience through real-world software projects while helping you develop industry-ready skills.

What You'll Gain

• Hands-on experience working on live client and internal projects.

• Structured On-the-Job Training under experienced mentors.

• Practical exposure to modern web development technologies and AI tools.

• Professional work experience certificate upon successful completion.

• Strong portfolio with real project contributions.

• Improved technical knowledge and interview confidence.

• Better career readiness for Full Stack Development roles.

• Continuous mentorship and career guidance throughout the program.

Technologies You'll Learn

• React.js

• Next.js

• TypeScript

• Node.js

• Express.js

• MongoDB

• PostgreSQL

• REST APIs

• AI API Integration (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude)

• Docker

Apply now and take the first step toward building your career as a Full Stack Developer with Bytes N Binary Innovations Pvt. Ltd.

Hire22.ai is India’s 1st Agentic AI Job Portal for mid and senior-level professionals, connecting candidates directly with employers through intelligent AI matching.

Every JobCoNCT stays active for only 22 hours, apply quickly to avoid missing interview-ready opportunities.

One of our client is building a team of Full Stack Developers to design, build, and scale modern cloud applications and data pipelines. This role demands a strong balance of robust backend enterprise development (.NET), cloud-native application patterns (Azure), and modern data engineering capabilities (Databricks).

REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS

• Mindset: Full-stack ownership mindset with strong problem-solving skills and the ability to build scalable, maintainable solutions.
• Collaboration: Strong communication and teamwork skills to collaborate effectively with U.S.-based stakeholders and proactively manage risks, blockers, and dependencies.
• Backend: Extensive experience with .NET Core, C#, Web API, and Entity Framework.
• Cloud Ecosystem: Hands-on experience with Azure services (Functions, Service Bus, Azure SQL, Key Vault).
• Data Engineering: Solid understanding of Azure Databricks, Apache Spark, and writing optimized SQL/Python queries for data analytics.
• Frontend: Proficiency in modern JavaScript frameworks (Angular, React, or Vue) is a strong plus.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Application Development: Build scalable backend services and APIs using C# and .NET Core, alongside clean, responsive front-end interfaces.
• Data Integration: Develop and maintain data processing pipelines, utilizing Azure Databricks (Spark/Python/Scala) for large-scale data transformation.
• Cloud Implementation: Deploy and manage microservices using Azure App Services, Azure Functions, and API Management.
• Delivery Coordination: Work closely with the Security and DevOps teams to embed automated testing and secure deployment practices into the CI/CD pipeline.

Job Type:

Full time

Experience:

Min 1 year experience

Education:

B.Tech CS / IT / AI & ML, MCA

Location:

Ernakulam / Cochin

We are looking for a skilled and driven Full Stack Developer to build and maintain scalable, dynamic web and mobile applications. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in modern web and mobile development frameworks. Experience with AI tools and the ability to integrate AI-powered features into applications to improve functionality, automation, and user experience will be an added advantage.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop, and maintain dynamic web applications using modern technologies.

• Integrate AI capabilities and LLM APIs into web and mobile platforms to streamline workflows and enhance user experiences.

• Develop and manage seamless data flow between front-end interfaces, back-end systems, and third-party services.

• Optimize applications for performance, scalability, and security.

• Work with databases like MySQL or PostgreSQL.

• Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve bugs while improving overall application efficiency.

Requirements:
• Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer, Mobile App Developer, or in a similar role.

• Strong proficiency in Python (Django, Flask, or FastAPI), PHP, and backend development.

• Experience in cross-platform mobile app development frameworks such as Flutter or React Native.

• Hands-on experience with AI integrations, large language models (LLMs), machine learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn), and prompt engineering.

• Experience with databases like MySQL or PostgreSQL.

• Solid understanding of relational databases, API design, and version control systems like Git.

• Excellent problem-solving abilities and the capability to work independently across the full software development lifecycle.

Qualifications:
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field (B.Tech CS/IT/AI&ML, MCA).

• Minimum 1 year of experience.

Job Type: Full-time, Permanent

Interested candidates can mail their resumes to career@brahmaait.com, specifying the designation in the subject line.

jobs.job_title: Full Stack Ui Developer  Enterprise Ai Hyderabad (India)
jobs.job_description:
Title: Full-Stack UI Developer Enterprise AI

Location: Hyderabad (Hybrid/Remote-friendly)

About the Role:

We are building the interface for the future of Enterprise AI. We are looking for an opinionated, frontend-heavy Full-Stack Developer to own our public-facing surfaces and our enterprise governance console. We launch frequently, and we need someone who finds energy in rapid, iterative release cycles.

What You Will Own:

Product UI Evolution: Audit, iterate, and own our React/Next.js frontend. You will take charge of our public website and our internal governance console, ensuring flawless performance across all browsers and devices.

Interactive Components: Implement complex UI elements—video embeds, interactive product demos, and real-time dashboard data—using contemporary animation libraries (Framer Motion/GSAP).

Architecture Ownership: You won't just "follow a design." You will collaborate with our Product Designer to push back on design decisions when a better, more performant, or more scalable technical approach exists.

What We Are Looking For:

• 3–5 years of full-stack UI development experience with a robust frontend bias.

• Deep fluency in React and Next.js, with robust opinions on stack choices and performance.

• Experience building responsive, PWA-ready, cross-browser interfaces.

• Comfort implementing interfaces on top of AI-driven backends (FastAPI/MCP/LLM integrations).

• Portfolio-driven: We want to see what you have shipped—live sites, GitHub repos, or interactive product surfaces. Title: Full-Stack UI Developer Enterprise AI

Location: Hyderabad (Hybrid/Remote-friendly)

About the Role:

We are building the interface for the future of Enterprise AI. We are looking for an opinionated, frontend-heavy Full-Stack Developer to own our public-facing surfaces and our enterprise governance console. We launch frequently, and we need someone who finds energy in rapid, iterative release cycles.

What You Will Own:

Product UI Evolution: Audit, iterate, and own our React/Next.js frontend. You will take charge of our public website and our internal governance console, ensuring flawless performance across all browsers and devices.

Interactive Components: Implement complex UI elements—video embeds, interactive product demos, and real-time dashboard data—using contemporary animation libraries (Framer Motion/GSAP).

Architecture Ownership: You won't just "follow a design." You will collaborate with our Product Designer to push back on design decisions when a better, more performant, or more scalable technical approach exists.

What We Are Looking For:

• 3–5 years of full-stack UI development experience with a robust frontend bias.

• Deep fluency in React and Next.js, with robust opinions on stack choices and performance.

• Experience building responsive, PWA-ready, cross-browser interfaces.

• Comfort implementing interfaces on top of AI-driven backends (FastAPI/MCP/LLM integrations).

• Portfolio-driven: We want to see what you have shipped—live sites, GitHub repos, or interactive product surfaces.

jobs.job_title: AI Agent Developer / Full Stack Engineer
jobs.job_description:
Job Role: AI Developer / Full Stack Engineer

Location: Bangalore

ABOUT UNILEVER

With 3. 4 billion people in over 190 countries using our products every day, Unilever is a business that makes a real impact on the world. Work on brands that are loved and improve the lives of our consumers and the communities around us.

We are driven by our purpose: to make sustainable living commonplace, and it is our belief that doing business the right way drives superior performance. At the heart of what we do is our people we believe that when our people work with purpose, we will create a better business and a better world.

At Unilever, your career will be a unique journey, grounded in our inclusive, collaborative, and flexible working environment. We don t believe in the one size fits all approach and instead we will equip you with the tools you need to shape your own future.

About Us:

Wild are on a mission to remove single-use plastic from the bathroom, armed with our refillable, natural and scent-sational deodorants, body wash, and lip balm and we re only just getting started. We launched in 2020 and as a high-growth company we re already one of Europe s fastest growing start-ups.
Role Summary:

The AI Developer / Full Stack Engineer is the primary builder of Wilds autonomous agents and the applications around them. Where the business today uses LLMs in a chat-based way, this role designs and ships agents that take action calling tools and APIs, executing multi-step workflows, and operating with minimal human intervention.

You will work end-to-end: designing agent logic in Google Agent Builder, integrating with Snowflake and business systems, and building the interfaces and services that let users interact with and supervise agents. This is a deeply hands-on engineering role for someone who enjoys turning ambiguous business problems into working, reliable software.

Quality and trust are central. You will build with evaluation, observability, and guardrails in mind, ensuring agents behave predictably, fail safely, and keep humans in control where it matters. You will iterate quickly, but always toward production-grade outcomes.

Key Responsibilities:

Design, build, and deploy AI agents on Google Agent Builder, including prompts, tools/functions, orchestration, and memory.

Develop full-stack applications front-end interfaces and back-end services/APIs that expose and supervise agent capabilities.

Integrate agents with Snowflake, internal systems, and third-party APIs to enable real task execution.

Implement retrieval (RAG) against Wilds data to ground agent responses and actions.

Build evaluation and testing harnesses for agent accuracy, safety, and regression control.

Instrument observability logging, tracing, and metrics for agent behaviour and performance.

Apply guardrails and human-in-the-loop patterns for sensitive or high-impact actions.

Optimise for performance and cost in collaboration with FinOps (model choice, caching, token-efficient design).

Support responsible AI practices and governance

Implement event-driven and API-based integrations (microservices patterns)

Required Skills & Experience

5+ years in software engineering with strong full-stack capability (e. g. Python/TypeScript; React or similar front-end).

3+ years hands-on experience building LLM-powered or agentic applications (tool calling, RAG, orchestration frameworks).

Practical experience with GCP and ideally Vertex AI / Google Agent Builder.

Strong API design and systems integration skills.

Comfort working with data sources such as Snowflake and writing performant SQL.

Familiarity with prompt engineering, agent evaluation, and safe-deployment practices.

Solid software hygiene: Git, CI/CD, testing, and code review.

Understanding of multi-agent systems and distributed architectures

Familiarity with LLMOps / GenAIOps concepts

Exposure to event-driven and scalable cloud systems

Experience in scaling and optimization of LLM systems

Experience using AI delivery tools like Claude Code, Antigravity etc

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with agent frameworks/enterprise AI platforms/ orchestration and vector search/embeddings.

Exposure to cloud cost optimisation / FinOps practices

GCP associate or professional certification.

Prior work shipping AI features to real users in production.

Bachelors in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.

Key Success Metrics

Agents/features shipped to production and adopted by business users.

Agent task success rate and reduction in error/escalation rates over time.

C

Solugenix is a leader in IT services, delivering cutting-edge technology solutions, exceptional talent, and managed services to global enterprises. With extensive expertise in highly regulated and complex industries, we are a trusted partner for integrating advanced technologies with streamlined processes. Our solutions drive growth, foster innovation, and ensure compliance—providing clients with reliability and a strong competitive edge.

Recognized as a 2024 Top Workplace, Solugenix is proud of its inclusive culture and unwavering commitment to excellence. Our recent expansion, with new offices in the Dominican Republic, Jakarta, and the Philippines, underscores our growing global presence and ability to offer world-class technology solutions. Partnering with Solugenix means more than just business—it means having a dedicated our financial client focused on your success in today's fast-evolving digital world.

Job Title : Full Stack AI Developer

Location : Hyderabad/Bangalore/Indore

Position : Full Time

Required Experience : 5-10 Years.

Timings : 11:30 AM – 8:30 PM IST (Hybrid).

We are seeking a highly skilled Full Stack AI/GenAI Developer to join our team. The role focuses on identifying, designing, developing, and delivering advanced technology solutions leveraging Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), Conversational AI, Machine Learning, and modern web technologies.

The successful candidate will play a key role in designing, developing, and deploying Web and AI solutions that meet the needs and expectations of the clients and the users. Building awareness around the challenges and the best practices that are involved in working with AI and striving to overcome them and improve their skills. Additionally, should have knowledge of cloud computing platforms such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, and tools such as Git, Docker, and Jupiter Notebook.

This position requires expertise in full-stack development, AI/ML technologies, Python, cloud platforms, and modern software engineering practices.

Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and maintain web applications using HTML, JavaScript, CSS, Angular, NestJS, NodeJS, and other technologies.

• Deploy and maintain AI applications in production and ensuring its reliability and scalability.

• Collaborate with other engineers, researchers, and domain experts to identify and define general intelligence problems and solutions.

• Conduct experiments and evaluations to measure and improve the performance, robustness, and scalability of general artificial intelligence systems.

• Stay updated on the latest developments and trends in GenAI intelligence research and applications.

• Write clean, readable, and testable code that follows best practices and standards.

• Debug and troubleshoot issues across different browsers and devices.

• Collaborate with other architects, developers, designers, and stakeholders to deliver high-quality products & services.

• Communicate and document the results and insights of general artificial intelligence projects to internal and external stakeholders.

Required Skills

• At least 5 years of experience as a full stack developer or similar role and 2+ years of experience in AI

• Proficient in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks (e.g. Angular, NestJS, NodeJS)

• Proficient in programming languages such as Python and SQL/ NOSQL databases

• Known to frameworks and libraries such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, Scikit-learn, and NLTK.

• Knowledge of web development tools such as Git, Webpack, NPM, or Babel

• Experience with databases such as MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, or Firebase

• Strong problem-solving and communication skills

• Knowledge of conversational system development

• Experience with developing AI models.

Desired Skills:

• Web Application Development – Develop and maintain web applications using HTML, JavaScript, CSS, Angular and other technologies.

• API Development - Develop rest APIs with right set of guardrails using NestJS, NodeJS, Python and other technologies.

• Natural language processing: the field of AI that deals with understanding and generating natural language, such as text and speech.

• Computer vision: the field of AI that deals with analyzing and interpreting visual information, such as images and videos.

• Reinforcement learning: a type of machine learning that involves learning from trial and error by interacting with an environment and receiving rewards or penalties.

• Data science: the practice of collecting, cleaning, analyzing, and visualizing data to gain insights

Job Title : AIML Engineer-(AI FullStack Developer)

Location : Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad

Who We Are

Tiger Analytics is a global leader in AI and analytics, helping Fortune 1000 companies solve their toughest challenges. We offer full-stack AI and analytics services & solutions to empower businesses to achieve real outcomes and value at scale. We are on a mission to push the boundaries of what AI and analytics can do to help enterprises navigate uncertainty and move forward decisively. Our purpose is to provide certainty to shape a better tomorrow.

Our team of 4000+ technologists and consultants are based in the US, Canada, the UK, India, Singapore and Australia, working closely with clients across CPG, Retail, Insurance, BFS, Manufacturing, Life Sciences, and Healthcare. Many of our team leaders rank in Top 10 and 40 Under 40 lists, exemplifying our dedication to innovation and excellence.

We are a Great Place to Work-Certified™ (2022-24), recognized by analyst firms such as Forrester, Gartner, HFS, Everest, ISG and others. We have been ranked among the ‘Best’ and ‘Fastest Growing’ analytics firms lists by Inc., Financial Times, Economic Times and Analytics India Magazine

Curious about the role? What your typical day would look like?

We are seeking a highly skilled AI Full Stack Developer with 5–6 years of experience in Artificial Intelligence and full-stack application development. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in delivering production-grade AI solutions, with proven involvement in at least two end-to-end AI projects deployed in production environments.

The candidate should possess strong expertise in AI application development, cloud infrastructure, deployment, and AgentOps practices to build scalable, reliable, and enterprise-ready AI solutions.

Technical Skills & Responsibilities

• Design, develop, and deploy end-to-end AI-powered applications using modern AI frameworks and full-stack technologies.
• Build and deliver production-grade AI solutions with a focus on scalability, reliability, and performance.
• Develop, deploy, and manage AI agents and agent-based workflows in enterprise environments.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI capabilities into business applications.
• Optimize AI models and applications for production deployment and operational efficiency.
• Implement cloud-native AI solutions on Microsoft Azure.
• Manage application deployment using containerization and orchestration technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
• Establish and maintain AgentOps and MLOps best practices for model lifecycle management, monitoring, and continuous improvement.
• Ensure high availability, observability, and performance of AI applications in production.

Required Skills

• 4-6 years of relevant AI development experience.
• Experience building end-to-end AI applications using modern AI frameworks and APIs.
• Strong understanding of backend and frontend development for AI-powered applications.
• Experience developing and integrating AI agents and intelligent workflows.
• Hands-on experience managing production AI environments.
• Strong understanding of AgentOps practices, including: Model versioning Continuous monitoring Production deployment lifecycle management Performance monitoring and optimization Incident management and operational support
• Experience designing and scaling AI applications on Microsoft Azure.
• Knowledge of cloud-native architectures and scalable infrastructure design.
• Practical experience with:Docker Kubernetes
• Experience building and managing CI/CD pipelines for AI applications.
• Knowledge of containerized deployments and orchestration for enterprise environments.

Preferred Skills

• Experience with enterprise AI platforms and Large Language Model (LLM) applications.
• Exposure to Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI agents, and multi-agent architectures.
• Understanding of AI governance, security, and responsible AI practices.
• Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
